name: Roz's Chocolate Trifle - (3)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line dish with Buduis biscuits and soak with sherry without making the mixture runny.
2. Whip the cream with desert spoon of caster sugar and cover the biscuits.
3. Melt the chocolate with three ounces of sugar and water, ensuring it does not boil.
4. Separate the eggs; add yolks to the chocolate mixture.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff. Fold into the chocolate mixture.
6. Spoon the mixture over the cream without pouring directly on top, as the cream will rise through.
7. Prepare ahead of time and chill in the fridge. Remove from the fridge one hour before serving.
